---
title: "gemini_search.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\gemini_search.py"
loc: 33
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.88
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.96
---

## Intent
The `gemini_search.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on GeminiSearch, __init__, is_available, search, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via GeminiSearch, __init__, is_available, search, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `GeminiSearch`
- `__init__`
- `is_available`
- `search`
- `main`
